Quick profile

I am still waiting for university admission, but I already have practical experience from real work. I have no formal certificates yet, so this portfolio is designed to show ability through projects, screenshots, and real output.

CorelDraw Desktop Publishing Web Development Computer Support Linux Print Design
Best fit roles
Graphic Designer, Desktop Publisher, Junior Web Developer, Computer Technician, and Tech Support.
Strong points
Problem solving, teamwork, reliability, dedication, fast learning, persistence, creativity, attention to detail, adaptability, and willingness to improve.
ABOUT

Built from real work, not empty claims.

Professional summary

I have practical experience in graphic design, desktop publishing, website building, computer troubleshooting, and Linux use. I enjoy solving problems and turning briefs into neat final results.

How I work

I follow instructions carefully, pay attention to detail, stay committed to deadlines, and keep working until a task is completed properly. I also work well with people and learn quickly on the job.

What this means for employers

You get someone who is already building with real tools, ready to grow, able to support a team, and serious about gaining stronger professional opportunities through practical contribution.

EXPERIENCE

Experience rewritten into CV ready points.

3 years

Graphic Design with CorelDraw

  • Designed service cards, thank you cards, logos, flyers, social graphics, invitation layouts, and branded promotional materials.
  • Prepared clean print friendly artwork with attention to spacing, color balance, hierarchy, and readability.
  • Worked confidently with CorelDraw as a main design tool for practical client facing materials.
2 years

Desktop Publishing

  • Arranged layouts for cards, printed materials, and presentation pieces with clean alignment and page balance.
  • Handled output preparation for visual materials that needed to look presentable both on screen and in print.
  • Supported professional finishing by organizing design elements into polished final compositions.
1 year

Website Development

  • Built websites and dashboards with working pages, profile features, reactions, comments, content sections, and user interface layouts.
  • Worked on responsive web structure, content arrangement, and interactive front end features.
  • Created web projects for community, education, AI tools, and blogging use cases.
1 year

Signage Design and Crafting

  • Gained practical exposure in signage related design and handling of crafted visual output.
  • Understood how visual design translates into physical branding and display work.
1 year

Computer Technician Support

  • Built experience around system use, support learning, troubleshooting, and general computer handling.
  • Comfortable around practical tech tasks and willing to grow deeper into maintenance and support roles.
6 months

Linux Exposure

  • Used different Linux environments including Kali, Ubuntu, and NetHunter.
  • Built confidence navigating alternative operating systems and learning technical workflows.
